summary: Possible accessibility barriers found on the AbilityNet contact page

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may not have alternative text, which could make it difficult for users who rely on screen readers to understand the content
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers may not be able to understand the content of images without alternative text, which could impact their ability to navigate and use the website
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Missing image alt text detected in the browser DOM

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some text may have low contrast with its background, which could make it difficult for users with visual impairments to read
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may have difficulty reading text with low contrast, which could impact their ability to understand and navigate the website
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Low contrast text detected in the low vision check

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some content may not reflow properly when the user zooms in, which could make it difficult for users with visual impairments to read and navigate the website
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may rely on zooming in to read content, and if the content does not reflow properly, it could impact their ability to use the website
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Fixed or wide content detected in the low vision check

outreach_notes: We suggest reviewing the AbilityNet contact page for potential accessibility barriers, including missing image alt text, low contrast text, and content that does not reflow properly when zoomed in.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
